channel.title: Starmer Watch — Pressure Index
channel.description: Composite pressure index, top news, and market signals for Keir Starmer's leadership.

item.title: Pressure Index 61/100 (elevated)
item.description: Public pressure bloc is above the modeled 81 MP trigger. Pressure Index 61/100 (elevated). Polymarket's top Starmer-exit signal is 16.5%.

item.title: Bluesky · @stephenkb.bsky.social: Great write-up of the Healey resignation by @lucyfisher.ft.com and @georgewparker.bsky.social:
item.description: Great write-up of the Healey resignation by @lucyfisher.ft.com and @georgewparker.bsky.social:

item.title: FT UK Politics: UK defence secretary resigns over spending plan
item.description: UK defence secretary resigns over spending plan

item.title: Novara Media: Defence Secretary Resigns Saying Spending Plans ‘Fall Well Short’
item.description: Defence Secretary Resigns Saying Spending Plans ‘Fall Well Short’

item.title: Guardian (Open Platform): Starmer’s premiership ‘falling apart’, opponents claim, after Healey resigns over defence funding – UK politics live
item.description: Starmer’s premiership ‘falling apart’, opponents claim, after Healey resigns over defence funding – UK politics live

item.title: Independent UK Politics: Andy Burnham backtracks on paying compensation to Waspi women

item.title: Guardian (Open Platform): John Healey’s departure is less of a surprise than it might seem

item.title: Independent UK Politics: Starmer in fresh crisis as Healey quits government with scathing attack on PM’s plan to protect Britain

item.title: Independent UK Politics: John Healey resigns latest: Starmer government thrown into chaos as defence secretary quits over military spending

item.title: The Guardian: Ministers want 60% of pupils in England ‘actively’ travelling to school by 2035 - The Guardian

item.title: Independent UK Politics: John Healey’s resignation is the beginning of the end for Starmer
item.description: John Healey’s resignation is the beginning of the end for Starmer
